steps.title: Calculate attendees of first and second workshops
steps.content: 70% of the 2,400 first-workshop attendees also attended the second workshop: $$0.70 \times 2,400 = 1,680$$

steps.title: Calculate attendees of first workshop only (not second)
steps.content: Subtract those who attended both from the total first-workshop attendees: $$2,400 - 1,680 = 720$$

steps.title: Calculate attendees of first and third but not second
steps.content: Of the 720 people who attended first but not second, 35% attended the third workshop: $$0.35 \times 720 = 252$$
